theme: island grid with mandatory spinning reserve
title: Island Microgrid Dispatch Under a Mandatory N-1 Spinning-Reserve Rule
strategies: proportional-by-capacity baseline: park the swing unit at zero (always N-1-safe) and split demand among the rest by raw capacity share, ignoring every efficiency curve

merit-order dispatch by linear fuel rate up to each unit's sweet spot, then patch any N-1 violation by shrinking the reserve-eligible group proportionally to current load and dumping the freed output onto whichever units have spare headroom

shadow-price dispatch: solve the two-multiplier KKT system (lambda for the demand balance, mu for the reserve-group capacity cap) via nested bisection, so displacement is allocated inversely to each unit's efficiency-curve curvature
iterative local search around the shadow-price solution that also re-optimizes which units belong to a tie-broken swing set
